Chemicals
What to do What’s trending Awards Leaders Careers
What to do What’s trending Awards Leaders Careers

Chemical consulting

Embracing change as a constant in chemicals. Chemical companies require innovative solutions to seize growth opportunities – from net zero to new products and more.

Chemical industry now

65%

of chemical executives say inflation and price volatility are the most pressing challenge

87%

of chemical CXOs say their organizations are currently undergoing compressed transformation

58%

of chemical executives have adopted a deliberate enterprise-wide strategy to reinvent all functions and business units

94%

of chemical executives are either very or extremely inspired by the new capabilities offered by AI foundation models

How to reinvent chemicals

Close
ACCENTURE + SAP

Reinvent growth by modernizing your digital core with SAP S/4HANA

How can chemical companies manage operations, analyze data and make informed predictions across enterprise functions in real time? Fortify your digital core and centralize all business data, using SAP S/4HANA in the cloud.
ACCENTURE + SAP

Reinvent growth by modernizing your digital core with SAP S/4HANA

How can chemical companies manage operations, analyze data and make informed predictions across enterprise functions in real time? Fortify your digital core and centralize all business data, using SAP S/4HANA in the cloud.
Close
RESEARCH & DEVELOPMENT

Accelerate innovation by reinventing R&D, based on digital, data and AI

Launch new and improved chemical offerings at reduced costs. Transform your traditional R&D to technology-enabled, highly-focused, predictive and prescriptive experimentation.
Learn more
RESEARCH & DEVELOPMENT

Accelerate innovation by reinventing R&D, based on digital, data and AI

Launch new and improved chemical offerings at reduced costs. Transform your traditional R&D to technology-enabled, highly-focused, predictive and prescriptive experimentation.
Learn more
Close
PRODUCTION & OPERATIONS

Drive operational excellence in chemical manufacturing and maintenance

Mitigate rising costs and talent scarcity. Use data, cloud and AI to move toward autonomous operations, driving efficiency, sustainability and growth.
Learn more
PRODUCTION & OPERATIONS

Drive operational excellence in chemical manufacturing and maintenance

Mitigate rising costs and talent scarcity. Use data, cloud and AI to move toward autonomous operations, driving efficiency, sustainability and growth.
Learn more
Close
COST & PRODUCTIVITY REINVENTION

Redesign the way you work to improve productivity

On average, companies see a 2.8x productivity increase when they put their people at the center with data and tech. Discover how to gain a competitive edge and shift from cost to cost-and-productivity.
Learn more
COST & PRODUCTIVITY REINVENTION

Redesign the way you work to improve productivity

On average, companies see a 2.8x productivity increase when they put their people at the center with data and tech. Discover how to gain a competitive edge and shift from cost to cost-and-productivity.
Learn more
Close
NET-ZERO TRANSITION

Shift from setting targets to delivering tangible decarbonization outcomes

With just 11% of chemical companies on track for net zero by 2050, it’s time to earn stakeholder trust through real decarbonization actions. Let us guide you from targets to tangible impact.
Learn more
NET-ZERO TRANSITION

Shift from setting targets to delivering tangible decarbonization outcomes

With just 11% of chemical companies on track for net zero by 2050, it’s time to earn stakeholder trust through real decarbonization actions. Let us guide you from targets to tangible impact.
Learn more
Close
MARKETING AND SALES

Increase market share by reinventing the B2B customer experience

84% of B2B leaders struggle to keep up with customer changes. Drive revenue and boost your marketing and sales capabilities through digital-enabled sales, dynamic pricing and data-driven insights.
MARKETING AND SALES

Increase market share by reinventing the B2B customer experience

84% of B2B leaders struggle to keep up with customer changes. Drive revenue and boost your marketing and sales capabilities through digital-enabled sales, dynamic pricing and data-driven insights.
Close
SUSTAINABLE VALUE CHAIN

Infuse sustainability into every link in your value chain

Did you know that about $4.5T in market opportunity will be generated by the circular economy by 2030? Redesign supply chains to support net-positive ambitions, increase circularity and build resilience and trust.
Learn more
SUSTAINABLE VALUE CHAIN

Infuse sustainability into every link in your value chain

Did you know that about $4.5T in market opportunity will be generated by the circular economy by 2030? Redesign supply chains to support net-positive ambitions, increase circularity and build resilience and trust.
Learn more
Close
BUSINESS SERVICES

Transform support functions to reduce costs, boost productivity and minimize risks

Companies drive operational excellence by transforming support functions to reduce costs and improve customer experience. Move your shared services toward intelligent business services with data, technology and talent.
BUSINESS SERVICES

Transform support functions to reduce costs, boost productivity and minimize risks

Companies drive operational excellence by transforming support functions to reduce costs and improve customer experience. Move your shared services toward intelligent business services with data, technology and talent.

What’s trending in chemicals

View all work
Research Report
Destination net zero 2025

How leading companies are scaling decarbonization that delivers business value—and why that’s the key to lasting impact.

Expand
Research Report
Customer-focused chemical growth: do less, better

The chemical industry's growth secret isn't just innovation. Dive into the latest research to uncover customer priorities and drive growth by doing less, better. Discover the truth behind what customers really want.

Expand
Research Report
Powered for Change 2025

One-off pilots won't decarbonize industry fast enough. Companies must shift from isolated projects to a multigenerational, AI-enabled approach.

Expand
Research Report
Future chemical demand—how to seize the $570B opportunity

Chemical companies can capture growth and secure price premiums as demand for sustainability-related products is projected to reach $570 billion by 2028. Discover actions they can take now to capitalize on this opportunity.

Expand
Blog
Agrochemicals: reshaping crop protection with biologicals

New solutions using biologicals are expected to surpass growth of the overall crop protection industry, shaping its future. Explore the strategic actions agrochemical companies can take to seize the lead.

Expand
Research Report
How biomass-based chemicals can drive growth

Chemical companies can capitalize on the growing market for sustainability-related products by producing biomass-based chemicals. Discover key actions to seize this opportunity.

Expand
Research Report
Cracking the labor productivity conundrum in the chemical industry

To meet rising sustainability-related demand and spur growth, chemical companies must boost stagnant labor productivity. How? By reinventing roles and reshaping the workforce to adapt to technology. Discover key strategies.

Expand
Blog
Reinventing innovation for chemical research and development

Digital technologies and generative AI are revolutionizing chemical research and development, driving new levels of innovation. Uncover the path to transforming innovation for R&D.

Expand

Awards and recognition

Leader for SAP S/4HANA® Application Services for Fourth Year

Accenture is continually recognized as a best-in-class technology services provider by independent, third-party networks and research organizations.

Read more

A Leader in Smart Manufacturing Services

Accenture is named a leading service provider of Industry X & Digital Smart Manufacturing and Operations services by HFS and IDC MarketScape.
